message:
fix: Add schema sanitization and timeout handling for Requesty

Improves Requesty provider reliability with schema validation fixes
and timeout protection, though agent-based execution remains limited.

Changes:
- Add sanitizeJsonSchema() method to fix array properties without items
- Remove unsupported JSON Schema 2020-12 keywords
- Add 60-second timeout to prevent hanging requests
- Limit tools to 10 maximum for Requesty (vs 213 available)
- Add AbortController for request cancellation
- Improve logging for tool conversion

Known Limitation:
Requesty provider works for simple API calls but hangs during Claude SDK
agent initialization with MCP tools. Recommend using OpenRouter for
agent-based tasks as it handles all 213 MCP tools without issues.

Technical Details:
- Schema sanitization recursively processes nested properties
- Adds default items: { type: "string" } for arrays
- Timeout triggers at 60s to prevent indefinite hangs
- Tool limiting prevents overwhelming Requesty API

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
